metadata.title: KPMG Lorem Ipsum Stress Test Deck (v3 contents + pnl)
metadata.author: kpmg-slidegen
metadata.subject: Layout and overflow stress-test using placeholder prose

slides.title: Key findings (1/2) - EBITDA bridge
slides.strapline: Illustrative bridge using synthetic values to validate layout behavior.
slides.heading: Adjusted EBITDA margin bridge
body: FY21 to FY22 adjusted EBITDA expanded on volume and mix improvements.
FY22 to FY23 reflects processing gains offset by compensation and software costs.
FY23 to TTM remains positive; downside sensitivity centers on margin normalization.
slides.noteSource: Source: Placeholder scaffold only for layout testing.
